title: Better Craft: Lineage
description: A Vanilla Plus/RPG Adventure modpack focused on telling the story of Minecraft through the Lineage you start the game as. Kill the Ender Dragon and uncover the hidden story of Minecraft's Lore in Better Craft Lineage, the first in the Better Craft Series!
body:
Many Quality of Life features are included through mods like Charm, Supplementaries, Voice Chat, and more things to overall improve your experience!

 

Better Craft Lineage is a modpack that changes dynamically every season! Leaves change colors and new mods and shaders are sometimes added! Certain features are exclusive to only certain seasons as to give incentive to play in each season. On top of these changes there are also included holidays celebrated by villagers.

 

Better Craft Lineage contains many performance mods to achieve the greatest performance possible. We are always trying to achieve the best performance to quality ratio.

 

Shaders, resource packs, and more are enabled by default. You can choose to disable any of these but it might alter the experience in a way that may not be intended.

 

Better Craft Lineage is built around a story and some of the origins you can pick tell that story in different ways. 

 

 

Improved Generation and Exploration through many structures biomes and even an entire line if Bosses to beat to be able to fight the dragon!

 

 

Better Craft Lineage includes many improvements to the base dimensions and adds more from mods like Blue Skies, The Aether, and more coming soon!
